sll $0,$0,0
#initialize
addi $0,$0,0x0000
addi $1,$0,0x0005
addi $2,$0,0x000A
addi $3,$0,0x0000

movn $4,$1,$3
addi $5,$0,0x0000

addi $6,$0,0x0001
movn $7,$1,$6
addi $8,$0,0x0005

movn $9,$2,$3
addi $10,$0,0x0000

addi $11,$0,0x0001
movn $12,$2,$11
addi $13,$0,0x000A

addi $14,$0,0xFFFF
movn $15,$1,$14
addi $16,$0,0x0005

movn $17,$0,$3
addi $18,$0,0x0000

addi $19,$0,0x0001
movn $20,$19,$3
addi $21,$0,0x0001

addi $22,$0,0x1234
addi $23,$0,0x5678
addi $24,$0,0x0001
movn $25,$22,$24
addi $26,$0,0x1234

movn $27,$23,$3
addi $28,$0,0x0000

addi $29,$0,0x0000
addi $30,$0,0x0001
addi $31,$0,0x0002

movn $29,$30,$31
addi $29,$29,0x0001

movn $29,$31,$29
addi $29,$29,0x0002

halt
